attributes.Lookup Sql Override:
SELECT 
NSCT.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE as BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE ,
NSCT.END_TV_DATE as END_TV_DATE, 
NSCT.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_DESCRIPTION as SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_DESCRIPTION, 
NSCT.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ENABLED_FLAG as SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ENABLED_FLAG, 
NSCT.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_QUOTA_FLAG as SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_QUOTA_FLAG, 
NSCT.START_TV_DATE as START_TV_DATE 
FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_TV NSCT
where NSCT.END_TV_DATE = '3500-01-01'
